today.title: Daily Slow Feed
today.subtitle: Slow down and keep only what is worth reading
today.loadingTitle: Slow down, content is on the way
today.loadingRetry: Cannot reach the backend right now. It will retry soon.
today.gestureSwipe: Swipe left and right to change modes instead of stacking an endless feed.
today.gestureRefresh: Pull to refresh fetches the latest content and stores it for offline use.
today.gestureFavorite: Favorites stay local for offline browsing; share opens the system sheet.
today.offlineBody: You are seeing the most recent cached daily content. It will refresh when the network returns.
today.deviceMissing: Please sign in and bind at least one device first.
today.actionsBody: Share, copy, favorite, or push this card to your device.
today.heroReasonFallback: A thoughtful card worth opening today.
today.errorBody: The feed did not load. Try refreshing again.
today.actionBody: Push a card to your device or continue browsing modes and history.
browse.title: Browse
browse.subtitle: History, favorites, and mode catalog
browse.localFallback: When signed out, this view shows local history and favorites. Sign in to switch to real device data.
browse.moreModesDesc: Open the full catalog to see every built-in and custom mode.
browse.emptyHistoryDesc: Content you view on the Today page will appear here.
browse.emptyFavoritesDesc: Long press a content card on the Today page to save it.
browse.emptyModesDesc: Waiting for mode catalog to load...
browse.recommendIntroBody: This section is assembled from today content and the current mode catalog, so it stays compatible with the current backend.
browse.section.todayDesc: The current mobile today feed, repacked as a richer browse entry.
browse.featuredModesDesc: Pulled from the current mode catalog endpoint.
browse.customModesDesc: Saved or generated modes from the current account and device scope.
browse.detail.content: Structured content detail and source info
browse.detail.default: This view shows summary, structured fields, and mode notes.
browse.detail.loginToSave: Sign in to save as a custom mode
catalog.title: Mode Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Browse 22+ modes in a three-column mobile grid and open details from here.
create.title: Create
create.subtitle: Generate modes with AI
create.option.aiDesc: Describe a mode in one sentence and generate a full structure.
create.option.templateDesc: Start from poetry, daily brief, zen, and other quick templates.
create.option.blankDesc: Build from fields, layout, and refresh strategy.
generate.title: AI Mode Generation
generate.subtitle: Describe the mode you want and AI will produce a complete, saveable definition.
generate.templatePrompt: Rewrite the mode "{name}", keeping its core style of {description}, and generate a new custom mode with a similar structure.
generate.defaultPrompt: Create a concise daily focus mode for deep work, restrained in tone and designed like an e-ink daily card.
generate.resultEmpty: The model preview will appear here.
generate.resultHint: Tap "Generate mode" and AI will create a complete mode definition from your description.
generate.loginRequired: Sign in before using AI generation
generate.saveRequireMode: Generate a mode before saving it
generate.selectDeviceHint: Choose which device to save this mode to
generate.noDevices: No device available. Please pair a device first.
me.title: Me
me.subtitle: Account, preferences, language, and onboarding.
me.guestTagline: Sign in to sync devices and preferences
me.onboardingDesc: Replay the product rhythm and intro
me.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
me.recentBrowsingEmpty: Your recent cards will show up here.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Cache, about, and experimental features.
settings.notLoggedIn: Sign in to load real preferences
settings.savedBody: Preferences and push registration status have been updated
settings.notificationBody: Open InkSight to see what is worth reading today.
device.title: Devices
device.subtitle: Multi-device status, configuration, and pairing.
device.loginRequiredDesc: Sign in to view and manage your InkSight devices.
device.noDevicesDesc: Pair an InkSight device using a pair code, or open by MAC address.
device.previewBody: Sign in to sync device status, provisioning, and collaborative access control.
device.detailSubtitle: Status, mode, refresh cadence, and firmware entry.
device.stateFallback: Sign in to view real-time device status.
device.widgetFallback: Sign in to view the desktop widget preview data.
device.widgetLoginPrompt: Sign in to view widget preview data.
device.widgetErrorGeneric: Failed to load. Please try again later.
device.refreshNowHint: Device will refresh immediately when in LIVE mode; otherwise it waits until the next wake cycle.
device.shareMissing: There is no shareable device content yet
device.provisionSubtitle: Bind your device using a pair code, or open by MAC address.
device.provisionStep1: 1. Put the device into pairing mode to get a code
device.provisionStep2: 2. Enter the pair code below to complete binding
members.title: Shared Members
members.subtitle: Manage shared members and permissions for this device.
requests.title: Approval Requests
requests.subtitle: Handle device sharing requests from other users.
requests.empty: There are no pending sharing requests right now.
requests.approveSuccess: The sharing request has been approved
requests.rejectSuccess: The sharing request has been rejected
firmware.title: Firmware
firmware.subtitle: Check the latest release and package information.
firmware.unavailable: Unable to fetch firmware info right now. Please try again later.
auth.subtitle: Sign in or create an account to sync your devices, favorites, and preferences.
auth.errorUsernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.errorUsernameFormat: Username can only contain letters and numbers
auth.errorPasswordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
onboarding.title: Welcome to InkSight
onboarding.subtitle: Learn about InkSight's core features and how to use them.
onboarding.slide1Summary: The home screen keeps only a few cards worth reading, so content appears as quietly as e-paper.
onboarding.slide2Summary: Today, Browse, and Create work on their own. Sign in later to sync content, preferences, and devices.
onboarding.slide3Title: With hardware, your phone becomes the control room
onboarding.slide3Summary: Provisioning, mode switching, refresh, member sharing, and firmware checks all happen in one mobile app.
